coveredSurfaces: Cloud Run AI Engine deploy smoke

expertAssessments.rationale: Semver tag pipeline completed deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke successfully.
AI Engine deploy smoke passed and the RAG/KRL cleanup had already passed local contract, smoke, and governance checks before release.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel usage checked after v8.11.121 production release. Current billing period effective usage was 5.3789 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, with no unexpected billed usage flagged by the local usage guard.

completedImprovements.title: Release RAG/KRL cleanup and DB index improvements to production
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.11.121 release script completed. Production /api/version returned version 8.11.121, commit 9c0639006e1f27c003b3b8b7cf272079db15f064, release tag v8.11.121, pipeline 2513278417. GitLab jobs deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke, and post_deploy_smoke all succeeded.
completedImprovements.note: Release includes refactor(rag): complete knowledge retrieval lite cleanup and the preceding AI resource command guidance fix.

notes: Runner health check passed before release: runner=ok docker=ok.
GitLab deploy readiness API check fell back to manual checklist because no token was visible to that script; the actual tag pipeline ran and completed successfully.
Current production base gate passed for 8.11.120 before creating v8.11.121.
Post-release version smoke passed after Vercel deployment propagated: /, /login, and /api/version returned successfully.
Direct /api/version check returned 8.11.121 with releaseTag v8.11.121 and pipelineUrl https://gitlab.com/skyasu2/openmanager-ai/-/pipelines/2513278417.
